sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8021" key="a)ndro/prw|ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρό-πρῳρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πρῷρα</etym>) <sense id="n8021.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with man's face,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
